title: Special Development Order: Northwood Headquarters, Sandy Lane, Northwood, Middlesex, HA6 3HP
body: "The Special Development Order was laid in Parliament on 15 January 2025 and will come into force on 5 February 2025.  The Town and Country Planning (Northwood Headquarters) Special Development Order 2025  An Explanatory Memorandum accompanies the Special Development Order. This provides an explanation of the effect of the legislation and why it is necessary.  The Special Development Order grants planning permission for the carrying out of certain classes of development at Northwood Headquarters, for the purpose of national defence, by or on behalf of the Secretary of State for Defence.  Further documents will be made available in due course.  Documents and notices  The map  A map showing the land at Northwood Headquarters that the Special Development Order applies to, shown bounded externally by the outer edge of a bold red line.             Northwood HQ Estate Development: the map    PDF, 585 KB, 1 page     This file may not be suitable for users of assistive technology.    Request an accessible format. Please tell us what format you need. It will help us if you say what assistive technology you use.      Project A Notices and statements  Notice given under article 5 of the Special Development Order, relevant approval, and the associated statement under Article 7 identifying the approved documents that have not been published for security reasons.
